name: studio.publish_post
description: Thin 1:1 wrapper over Studio's publish_post endpoint. Ships the current draft of a blog post, optionally at a scheduled time.
whenToUse: Ship a blog post after editorial review has approved the draft.
Scheduled go-live: provide scheduled_at for future publication.
Batch publication driver that iterates approved drafts and ships them one by one.
whenNotToUse: Post is already published and unchanged — calling publish_post again is a billed no-op.
Caller has not finished editing the post — use studio.update_post first; publishing mid-edit ships partial work.
Autonomous-mode call without operator approval — publishing is public-facing; route through HITL first.
